tasks.name: kimi-ipo-date
tasks.goal: Notify me when there is credible news about Kimi or Moonshot AI IPO timing, official filing schedule, listing exchange, or prospectus progress.
tasks.criteria: Notify ONLY if the article contains a concrete, verifiable IPO-related fact: (a) a specific calendar date or unambiguous quarter+year for listing/filing/hearing, OR (b) an official exchange/regulator filing / prospectus registration that is named (not rumor). Do NOT notify for exploration language alone (may, could, seeking, weighing, reportedly considering, eyes IPO) unless the same piece states a specific date or confirmed filing. Crypto memecoins and unrelated 'moonshot' tickers are not matches.

queryPlan.summary: Single google_news query for Kimi / Moonshot IPO timing news.

queries.reason: Short query so Google News returns results; evaluator still applies strict IPO criteria.
